channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. increases military capacity as Iran conflict expands to Jordan and Red Sea
item.description: The U.S. deploys additional heavy bombers and refueling aircraft to the Middle East as hostilities in the Iran war escalate.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha moves off Louisiana toward Texas. Track its path.
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

item.title: Iran live updates: Rubio says Iran will 'pay a price' when asked about US escalation
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: House committee urges DOJ to charge former Trump prosecutor Jack Smith
item.description: The GOP chair of the House Judiciary Committee urged the DOJ to consider criminal charges against Jack Smith, alleging the former special counsel who...
